title: pappophorum scabrum
intro: Pappophorum scabrum, also known as the rough pappophorum or hairy pappophorum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. It is native to Mexico and is traditionally used in folk medicine for its various health benefits. The plant has been found to have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. Pappophorum scabrum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems.
